name: ubiquiti-unifi-ids-ips
description: Parses Ubiquiti UniFi Network CEF-format IDS/IPS threat detection and blocking alerts

test_samples.input: Jun 24 15:22:05 UCG-Max CEF:0|Ubiquiti|UniFi Network|10.4.57|201|Threat Detected and Blocked|7|UNIFIcategory=Security UNIFIhost=UCG Max proto=TCP spt=37383 dpt=443 act=blocked app=HTTPS UNIFIrisk=medium UNIFIpolicyName=DShield Block List UNIFIpolicyType=IDS/IPS UNIFIdirection=incoming deviceOutboundInterface=Default UNIFIdeviceMac=28:70:4e:84:bc:d5 UNIFIdeviceName=UCG Max UNIFIdeviceModel=UCG-Max UNIFIdeviceIp=192.168.1.1 UNIFIdeviceVersion=5.1.19 src=45.194.67.146 dst=192.168.1.194 UNIFIsrcRegion=BR UNIFIdstZone=Internal UNIFItotalBytes=54 UNIFItotalPackets=1 UNIFIpacketsReceived=0 UNIFIpacketsSent=1 UNIFIbytesReceived=0 UNIFIbytesSent=54 UNIFIflowCount=1 UNIFIflowId=null UNIFIflowStartTime=Jun 24, 2026 at 3:22:03.532 PM UNIFIipsSessionId=1316644713078973 UNIFIipsSignature=ET DROP Dshield Block Listed Source group 1 UNIFIipsSignatureId=2402000 UNIFIutcTime=2026-06-24T20:22:05.002Z msg=A network intrusion attempt from 45.194.67.146 to 192.168.1.194 has been detected and blocked.

expect.message: A network intrusion attempt from 45.194.67.146 to 192.168.1.194 has been detected and blocked.
expect.signature_name: ET DROP Dshield Block Listed Source group 1
